parameters.name: projectVersionId
parameters.description: The ID of the project version

parameters.name: excludeArticles
parameters.description: `True` - Articles will be excluded; `False` - Articles will be included

parameters.name: langCode
parameters.description: Get article in the project version that corresponds to the given language code. If the language code is empty, the default language of the project version will be taken into account

parameters.name: includeCategoryDescription
parameters.description: `True` - Include category description; `False` - Exclude category description

parameters.name: securityVisibility
parameters.description: Optional protection level filter: 0 = Public, 1 = Private. If null, returns all categories regardless of protection level.
